TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Czechia Czechia u Czechia sa i labu nu Europe, itiza i 49 45 N, 15 30 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 78,867 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 77,247 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 1,620 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 10,644,842. kakalukan umah sa 54.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 34.40%, zumaay henay umah sa 10.80%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Prague. sapadateng kininan nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 28 bulad 10 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci MiloŇ° Zeman, micakat a demiad sa i 2013 a mihca 3 bulad 8 demiad. u cunli nu Czechia ayza sa ci Andrej BabiŇ°, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihcaan 12 bulad 13 demiad. u hata nu Czechia u kulit nu hata nu Czechia sa, situlu ku kulit, u salengacay u sumilaway atu sumanahay. Czechia masakaputay a kanatal (u kamu nu Czechia, ńĆesk√° republika), u ngangan sa u Czechia (ńĆesko), tizaay i lalabuay a kanatal i nuteban a Europe, nika i tini i laylayay palasic mala u kanatal i nuwalian a Europe, Czechia i kasumamadan a ziday pangangan han Puo-si-mi-ya knatal, u kasenengan a Sen-shen-lu-ma kanatal kahenulan a tuse atu tuluay a bataan a mihcaan mangangayaw sinku a kiukay u nganganyawan a lalekalan , ayzaay a mihcaan Aow-ti-li a kanatal atu Ao-sung a kanatal nu kikayay a nikasaupuan a kusi . (u kamu nu Hulam: Czechiaść∑ŚÖčŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(ść∑ŚÖčŤ™ě:ńĆesk√° republika),ťÄöÁ®ĪCzechiaść∑ŚÖč(ńĆesko), .) i kasuayawan nu ngangayaw a ziday pangangan han Czechia-se-lu-ba-ce , i kitakit sakasepat tabakiay a kusi nu kanatal, nika i 1993 a mihcaan Tan-e-zung-li-hun namalaliyas palalecad a mangangelih malatusaay a kanatal tu Czechia atu se-lu-ba-ce zayhan nauynuanay a laylay a satu, Czechia misangaay a kikay a kusi, bulu a kusi, papiidangay a kusi, macakat tu amin uyza aca Se-la-bu a kanatalay a tademawan palalecad u satalakaway u sakapahay sapasubana u masabinawlay a kanatal. tademaw nu GDP u talakaway, minanam tu cudad u sakapahay, u min-cu-hua a kanatal. Czechia a lala'an, naizaway tu kuniu malumalay a batu'ay aziday alala'ngawaan atu baluhay a batu' a zitay a lalangawan, uynian kasumamadan a tademaw atu ayzaay a Czechia a binacadan, caay ka kapah ku masasicabay nu binacadan, i lalayan caay kayadah u midesekay micekiway a tademaw hiza a saan tuni u, katuuday a tademaw pa ngangan sa Czechia Czechia a tademaw angangsawan a tuas u Se-la-bu-zen a datemawan, i celah enen nu kasumamadan a mihcaan, i kawanan kawali u kananelan a kakitizaan ,siwa a mihcaan a malacacay mapulung tu Po-si-mi-ya a kanatal uyzaan amin nu ayzaay a Czechia . (u kamu nu Hulam: Czechia Czechia Czechia .) Czechia-se-lu-ba-ce 1918a mihcaan pahezek tu saayaway ngangayaw nu kitakit,,Ao-suong-di-kuo mawatwat , nauyaan u Ao-sung a sakaput tu Czechiaść∑ŚÖč mala u misatekeday tu a kanatal, u namasungaayay ku kacacayad tu atu Se-lu-ba-ke i 1918 a mihcaan cacay bataan a bulad tusa bataan izaw ku pitu a demiad papulung han Czechia mala u Czechia-se-lu-ba-ce . masakaputay kapulungan a kanatal . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 1918 Czechia Czechiaść∑ŚÖčśĖĮśīõšľźŚÖčŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč.) cence Czechia . Czechia u yadahay a sakaput u Yi-huay-min-cu-ze, cenbu u sakakaay matinengay tu mukeliday. Czechia yi-huay pahiza tu tusaay a kawaw, Cung-i-yuan izaw ku 200 a tademaw atu Can-yi-yuan a tademaw izaw tu 81 a tademaw a nikapulung , nasaayaway Cou-huay-lian-he mizuzuh tu pisingkiw cinacacay a mala Cung-tung lima a mihcaan, kapah lalid asaan tu kinacacay, Cung0tung caay ku tatengaay a enengan nika u sakakaay izaw ku tungus a mikuwan, u mahiniay a lalekuan palatatenga ku tatengilan nu kanatal, nika mahiniay u micidekay a kawaw taneng a paliwasak tu tadengilan a kanatal, a situngus ciniza pangangan tu cung-li atu mikawaway tu kanatal a kawaw a tademaw. hekal a lala' i labu nu Ow-cow u Czechia u i tepan nu Ou ulabuay a kanatal, capi izaw ku aepatay a kanatal nuamisan u Poland , tepan nuwalian u Germany , nutimulan u Austria atu wamisan nutimulan u Slovakia . ayzaay u Czechia kahenulan izaw tu ayawanay a Au-sun-ti-kou a ziday Po-si-mi-ya atu Mu-la-uay-ya unian tusaay kasumamadan a kakutizaan, adidi'ay a Si-li-si-ya a lala' a u liwliw niza. kahenulanay u tabakiay a tuse u Prague (Pu-la-ke ŚłÉśčČś†ľ), maawas ku Fu-eta-wa a sauwac tusa a tukus, salungan ku hekal nu aazihan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) Czechia cacayay ku tulu makunul ku sepatay a masahelungay , nutipan u Po-si-mi-ya talakaway a buyu', nutimulan u Ka-el-pa-can a buyu', tunusauwac , ukahenulanay a sauwac u Fu-el-ta-wa sauwac atu atu Mu-la-wa sauwac. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Czechia .) demiad tungusay u bayuay pasayza i Ta-lu a demiad tabesiw tu ku akuti'ay a demiad, apalaludan caledes, kasienawan cu'det yadah ku suleda. uyzaan kacalesan tu pituay a demiad, cacay a bulad u cu'detay a demiad. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: . .) sakikalisiw Czechiaść∑ŚÖčŚąóŤĽäÁ≥ĽÁĶĪŚÖ®ÁĒĪŇ†kodaŤá™ŚäõÁĒüÁĒĘ,Czechia . Czechia a u sakasilac nu kazizen uyza amin nuŇ†koda ni sangaan, Czechia kahenulan nu misangaay tu kikay, nu hua-siy a kusi, misangaay a 'kim, mitenunay a kusi, misangaay tu kucu, misangaay a kilang, misangaay a dadungu atu misangaay tu bilu mahiniay a kusi. sakikalisiw Czechia a u sakasilac nu kazizen uyza amin nuŇ†koda ni sangaan, Czechia kahenulan nu misangaay tu kikay, nu hua-siy a kusi, misangaay a 'kim, mitenunay a kusi, misangaay tu kucu, misangaay a kilang, misangaay a dadungu atu misangaay tu bilu mahiniay a kusi. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Czechiaść∑ŚÖčŚąóŤĽäÁ≥ĽÁĶĪŚÖ®ÁĒĪŇ†kodaŤá™ŚäõÁĒüÁĒĘ,Czechia .) Czechia i 2006 a mihcaan mala u kitakitay a gingku pacumut tu a kanatal a silsil. inutimulan i Ou-cou akanatal izaw ku Czechia saizawam min ku talakaway katinengay a tademaw . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Czechiaść∑ŚÖčśĖľ2006 .) u kikay a kusi Pu-la-ke u kahenulanay a u kikay a kusi i tepanay, Pu-rl-no, Au-se-te-la-wa, Pi-el-san atu Mu-la-ta-po-ley-se-la-hu. Czechiau kikay a kusi u kahenulan u nu hua-siy a kusi, kikay, misa'kim atu misanga tu mukanay a u kikay a kusi. uzumaay a kahenulan izaw ku patelay u kikay a kusi, misanga tu luma' atu u u sapalawpes tu tuud sanga' izaw ku zikuz, keliw, kucu, Yin-sua-ye, kilang pasanga' tu uaenengaan nu luma', sasulitan, satekin atu u hitay atu adingu nisanga'ay, i Czechia katenes tu kasumamadan. u kazizeng patahekal u kanatal a u kikay a kusi u kahenulan a kawaw. Czechia a tademaw izaw tu 1,054 mang, duduc tu 2011 a mihcaan tusaay saayaway pahezek tu nikisaan a tzdemaw, tademaw nu Czechia u nu Czechiaay amin a tademaw izaw ku (63.7ÔľÖ), kinapina u Mu-la-wiy-ya a tademaw izaw ku (4.9ÔľÖ), Se-lu-ba-ke a tademaw izaw ku (1.4ÔľÖ), Poland a tdemaw izaw ku (0.4ÔľÖ), Germany a tademaw izaw ku (0.2ÔľÖ) atu Si-li-si-ya a tademaw (0.1ÔľÖ). uyza u kika' nu kanatal"ŚúčÁĪć" taneng mipili tu katuudy a tademaw , kakatuuay ku tademaw nayay ku aenengan (26.0ÔľÖ). duduc tuni sulitan, Czechia pakala tu 25 a mang u Lu-mu a tademaw. (u akamu nu Hulam sa: Czechia ,Czechiaść∑ŚÖčÁöĄŚ§ßŚ§öśēłŚĪÖśįĎśėĮ Czechiaść∑ŚÖčšļļ(63.7ÔľÖ), .) mikawaway tu aidangan namakay i 1989 a mihcaan kunikapingku nu kanatal, Pu-la-ke a tuse ukatuud ku miidangay a tademaw i Europe i mikawaway tu aidangan aca u kalisiway u kahenulanay a kakataynian, 2001 a mihcaan , mikawaway tu aidangan pulung nu micumuday a kalisiw makala tu 1181.3 i' Czechia-ke-lang, calapen ku ko-min-sen-san-maw-e pakala tu 5.5%. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Ťá™Śĺě1989 5.5%.) malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

(u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶z…ô ¶ńßia .) ¶z…ô ¶ńßia-s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba- ¶…ô ****a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk tu saajawaj ŇčaŇčajaw nu kitakit,,ao-suoŇč-di-kuo mawatwat , naujaan u ao-suŇč a sakaput tu ¶z…ô ¶ńßia** mar~…ĺa u misat…ôk…ôdaj tu a kanatar~…ĺ, u namasuŇčaajaj ku ka ¶a ¶ajad tu atu s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba-k…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bataan a bur~…ĺad tusa bataan izaw ku pitu a d…ômiad papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan ¶z…ô ¶ńßia mar~…ĺa u ¶z…ô ¶ńßia-s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba- ¶…ô . masakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: **** ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶z…ô ¶ńßia*********.) ¶…ôn ¶…ô ¶z…ô ¶ńßia . ¶z…ô ¶ńßia u jadańßaj a sakaput u ji-ńßuaj-min- ¶u-z…ô, ¶…ônbu u sakakaaj matin…ôŇčaj tu muk…ôr~…ĺidaj. ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ji-ńßuaj pańßiza tu tusaaj a kawaw, ¶uŇč-i-juan izaw ku *** a tad…ômaw atu ¶an-ji-juan a tad…ômaw izaw tu ** a tad…ômaw a nikapur~…ĺuŇč , nasaajawaj ¶ou-ńßuaj-r~…ĺian-ńß…ô mizuzuńß tu pisiŇčkiw ¶ina ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan, kapańß r~…ĺar~…ĺid asaan tu kina ¶a ¶aj, ¶uŇč*tuŇč ¶aaj ku tat…ôŇčaaj a …ôn…ôŇčan nika u sakakaaj izaw ku tuŇčus a mikuwan, u mańßiniaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkuan par~…ĺatat…ôŇča ku tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ, nika mańßiniaj u mi ¶id…ôkaj a kawaw tan…ôŇč a par~…ĺiwasak tu tad…ôŇčir~…ĺan a kanatar~…ĺ, a situŇčus ¶iniza paŇčaŇčan tu ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi atu mikawawaj tu kanatar~…ĺ a kawaw a tad…ômaw. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu nu ow- ¶ow u ¶z…ô ¶ńßia u i t…ôpan nu ou ur~…ĺabuaj a kanatar~…ĺ, ¶api izaw ku a…ôpataj a kanatar~…ĺ nuamisan u por~…ĺand , t…ôpan nuwar~…ĺian u g…ôrmanj , nutimur~…ĺan u austria atu wamisan nutimur~…ĺan u sr~…ĺo*akia . ajzaaj u ¶z…ô ¶ńßia kańß…ônur~…ĺan izaw tu ajawanaj a au-sun-ti-kou a zidaj po-si-mi-ja atu mu-r~…ĺa-uaj-ja unian tusaaj kasumamadan a kakutizaan, adidi Ē~ °aj a si-r~…ĺi-si-ja a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw niza. kańß…ônur~…ĺanaj u tabakiaj a tus…ô u pragu…ô (pu-r~…ĺa-k…ô ***), maawas ku fu-…ôta-wa a sauwa ¶ tusa a tukus, sar~…ĺuŇčan ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu aazińßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶a ¶ajaj ku tur~…ĺu makunur~…ĺ ku s…ôpataj a masańß…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj , nutipan u po-si-mi-ja tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, nutimur~…ĺan u ka-…ôr~…ĺ-pa- ¶an a buju Ē~ °, tunusauwa ¶ , ukańß…ônur~…ĺanaj a sauwa ¶ u fu-…ôr~…ĺ-ta-wa sauwa ¶ atu atu mu-r~…ĺa-wa sauwa ¶. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia .) d…ômiad tuŇčusaj u bajuaj pasajza i ta-r~…ĺu a d…ômiad tab…ôsiw tu ku akuti Ē~ °aj a d…ômiad, apar~…ĺar~…ĺudan ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, kasi…ônawan ¶u Ē~ °d…ôt jadańß ku sur~…ĺ…ôda. ujzaan ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôsan tu pituaj a d…ômiad, ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad u ¶u Ē~ °d…ôtaj a d…ômiad. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: . .) sakikar~…ĺisiw ¶z…ô ¶ńßia*********koda****, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia . ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a u sakasir~…ĺa ¶ nu kaziz…ôn ujza amin nu*koda ni saŇčaan, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu misaŇčaaj tu kikaj, nu ńßua-sij a kusi, misaŇčaaj a Ē~ °kim, mit…ônunaj a kusi, misaŇčaaj tu ku ¶u, misaŇčaaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, misaŇčaaj a daduŇču atu misaŇčaaj tu bir~…ĺu mańßiniaj a kusi. sakikar~…ĺisiw ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a u sakasir~…ĺa ¶ nu kaziz…ôn ujza amin nu*koda ni saŇčaan, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu misaŇčaaj tu kikaj, nu ńßua-sij a kusi, misaŇčaaj a Ē~ °kim, mit…ônunaj a kusi, misaŇčaaj tu ku ¶u, misaŇčaaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, misaŇčaaj a daduŇču atu misaŇčaaj tu bir~…ĺu mańßiniaj a kusi. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia*********koda****, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia .) ¶z…ô ¶ńßia i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u kitakitaj a giŇčku pa ¶umut tu a kanatar~…ĺ a sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ. inutimur~…ĺan i ou- ¶ou akanatar~…ĺ izaw ku ¶z…ô ¶ńßia saizawam min ku tar~…ĺakawaj katin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia******* .) u kikaj a kusi pu-r~…ĺa-k…ô u kańß…ônur~…ĺanaj a u kikaj a kusi i t…ôpanaj, pu-rr~…ĺ-no, au-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-wa, pi-…ôr~…ĺ-san atu mu-r~…ĺa-ta-po-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßu. ¶z…ô ¶ńßiau kikaj a kusi u kańß…ônur~…ĺan u nu ńßua-sij a kusi, kikaj, misa Ē~ °kim atu misaŇča tu mukanaj a u kikaj a kusi. uzumaaj a kańß…ônur~…ĺan izaw ku pat…ôr~…ĺaj u kikaj a kusi, misaŇča tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu u u sapar~…ĺawp…ôs tu tuud saŇča Ē~ ° izaw ku zikuz, k…ôr~…ĺiw, ku ¶u, jin-sua-j…ô, kir~…ĺaŇč pasaŇča Ē~ ° tu ua…ôn…ôŇčaan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sasur~…ĺitan, sat…ôkin atu u ńßitaj atu adiŇču nisaŇča Ē~ °aj, i ¶z…ô ¶ńßia kat…ôn…ôs tu kasumamadan. u kaziz…ôŇč patańß…ôkar~…ĺ u kanatar~…ĺ a u kikaj a kusi u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kawaw. ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a tad…ômaw izaw tu *,*** maŇč, dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tusaaj saajawaj pańß…ôz…ôk tu nikisaan a tzd…ômaw, tad…ômaw nu ¶z…ô ¶ńßia u nu ¶z…ô ¶ńßiaaj amin a tad…ômaw izaw ku (**.**), kinapina u mu-r~…ĺa-wij-ja a tad…ômaw izaw ku (*.**), s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba-k…ô a tad…ômaw izaw ku (*.**), por~…ĺand a td…ômaw izaw ku (*.**), g…ôrmanj a tad…ômaw izaw ku (*.**) atu si-r~…ĺi-si-ja a tad…ômaw (*.**). ujza u kika Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ"**" tan…ôŇč mipir~…ĺi tu katuudj a tad…ômaw , kakatuuaj ku tad…ômaw najaj ku a…ôn…ôŇčan (**.**). dudu ¶ tuni sur~…ĺitan, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia pakar~…ĺa tu ** a maŇč u r~…ĺu-mu a tad…ômaw. (u akamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia , ¶z…ô ¶ńßia********* ¶z…ô ¶ńßia***(**.**), .) mikawawaj tu aidaŇčan namakaj i **** a mińß ¶aan kunikapiŇčku nu kanatar~…ĺ, pu-r~…ĺa-k…ô a tus…ô ukatuud ku miidaŇčaj a tad…ômaw i …ôurop…ô i mikawawaj tu aidaŇčan a ¶a u kar~…ĺisiwaj u kańß…ônur~…ĺanaj a kakatajnian, **** a mińß ¶aan , mikawawaj tu aidaŇčan pur~…ĺuŇč nu mi ¶umudaj a kar~…ĺisiw makar~…ĺa tu ****.* i Ē~ ° ¶z…ô ¶ńßia-k…ô-r~…ĺaŇč, ¶ar~…ĺap…ôn ku ko-min-s…ôn-san-maw-…ô pakar~…ĺa tu *.*%. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ****** *.*%.) mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Czechia Czechia u Czechia sa i labu nu Europe, itiza i 49 45 N, 15 30 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 78,867 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 77,247 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 1,620 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 10,644,842. kakalukan umah sa 54.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 34.40%, zumaay henay umah sa 10.80%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Prague. sapadateng kininan nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 28 bulad 10 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci MiloŇ° Zeman, micakat a demiad sa i 2013 a mihca 3 bulad 8 demiad. u cunli nu Czechia ayza sa ci Andrej BabiŇ°, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihcaan 12 bulad 13 demiad. u hata nu Czechia u kulit nu hata nu Czechia sa, situlu ku kulit, u salengacay u sumilaway atu sumanahay. Czechia masakaputay a kanatal (u kamu nu Czechia, ńĆesk√° republika), u ngangan sa u Czechia (ńĆesko), tizaay i lalabuay a kanatal i nuteban a Europe, nika i tini i laylayay palasic mala u kanatal i nuwalian a Europe, Czechia i kasumamadan a ziday pangangan han Puo-si-mi-ya knatal, u kasenengan a Sen-shen-lu-ma kanatal kahenulan a tuse atu tuluay a bataan a mihcaan mangangayaw sinku a kiukay u nganganyawan a lalekalan , ayzaay a mihcaan Aow-ti-li a kanatal atu Ao-sung a kanatal nu kikayay a nikasaupuan a kusi . (u kamu nu Hulam: Czechiaść∑ŚÖčŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(ść∑ŚÖčŤ™ě:ńĆesk√° republika),ťÄöÁ®ĪCzechiaść∑ŚÖč(ńĆesko), .) i kasuayawan nu ngangayaw a ziday pangangan han Czechia-se-lu-ba-ce , i kitakit sakasepat tabakiay a kusi nu kanatal, nika i 1993 a mihcaan Tan-e-zung-li-hun namalaliyas palalecad a mangangelih malatusaay a kanatal tu Czechia atu se-lu-ba-ce zayhan nauynuanay a laylay a satu, Czechia misangaay a kikay a kusi, bulu a kusi, papiidangay a kusi, macakat tu amin uyza aca Se-la-bu a kanatalay a tademawan palalecad u satalakaway u sakapahay sapasubana u masabinawlay a kanatal. tademaw nu GDP u talakaway, minanam tu cudad u sakapahay, u min-cu-hua a kanatal. Czechia a lala'an, naizaway tu kuniu malumalay a batu'ay aziday alala'ngawaan atu baluhay a batu' a zitay a lalangawan, uynian kasumamadan a tademaw atu ayzaay a Czechia a binacadan, caay ka kapah ku masasicabay nu binacadan, i lalayan caay kayadah u midesekay micekiway a tademaw hiza a saan tuni u, katuuday a tademaw pa ngangan sa Czechia Czechia a tademaw angangsawan a tuas u Se-la-bu-zen a datemawan, i celah enen nu kasumamadan a mihcaan, i kawanan kawali u kananelan a kakitizaan ,siwa a mihcaan a malacacay mapulung tu Po-si-mi-ya a kanatal uyzaan amin nu ayzaay a Czechia . (u kamu nu Hulam: Czechia Czechia Czechia .) Czechia-se-lu-ba-ce 1918a mihcaan pahezek tu saayaway ngangayaw nu kitakit,,Ao-suong-di-kuo mawatwat , nauyaan u Ao-sung a sakaput tu Czechiaść∑ŚÖč mala u misatekeday tu a kanatal, u namasungaayay ku kacacayad tu atu Se-lu-ba-ke i 1918 a mihcaan cacay bataan a bulad tusa bataan izaw ku pitu a demiad papulung han Czechia mala u Czechia-se-lu-ba-ce . masakaputay kapulungan a kanatal . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 1918 Czechia Czechiaść∑ŚÖčśĖĮśīõšľźŚÖčŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč.) cence Czechia . Czechia u yadahay a sakaput u Yi-huay-min-cu-ze, cenbu u sakakaay matinengay tu mukeliday. Czechia yi-huay pahiza tu tusaay a kawaw, Cung-i-yuan izaw ku 200 a tademaw atu Can-yi-yuan a tademaw izaw tu 81 a tademaw a nikapulung , nasaayaway Cou-huay-lian-he mizuzuh tu pisingkiw cinacacay a mala Cung-tung lima a mihcaan, kapah lalid asaan tu kinacacay, Cung0tung caay ku tatengaay a enengan nika u sakakaay izaw ku tungus a mikuwan, u mahiniay a lalekuan palatatenga ku tatengilan nu kanatal, nika mahiniay u micidekay a kawaw taneng a paliwasak tu tadengilan a kanatal, a situngus ciniza pangangan tu cung-li atu mikawaway tu kanatal a kawaw a tademaw. hekal a lala' i labu nu Ow-cow u Czechia u i tepan nu Ou ulabuay a kanatal, capi izaw ku aepatay a kanatal nuamisan u Poland , tepan nuwalian u Germany , nutimulan u Austria atu wamisan nutimulan u Slovakia . ayzaay u Czechia kahenulan izaw tu ayawanay a Au-sun-ti-kou a ziday Po-si-mi-ya atu Mu-la-uay-ya unian tusaay kasumamadan a kakutizaan, adidi'ay a Si-li-si-ya a lala' a u liwliw niza. kahenulanay u tabakiay a tuse u Prague (Pu-la-ke ŚłÉśčČś†ľ), maawas ku Fu-eta-wa a sauwac tusa a tukus, salungan ku hekal nu aazihan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) Czechia cacayay ku tulu makunul ku sepatay a masahelungay , nutipan u Po-si-mi-ya talakaway a buyu', nutimulan u Ka-el-pa-can a buyu', tunusauwac , ukahenulanay a sauwac u Fu-el-ta-wa sauwac atu atu Mu-la-wa sauwac. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Czechia .) demiad tungusay u bayuay pasayza i Ta-lu a demiad tabesiw tu ku akuti'ay a demiad, apalaludan caledes, kasienawan cu'det yadah ku suleda. uyzaan kacalesan tu pituay a demiad, cacay a bulad u cu'detay a demiad. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: . .) sakikalisiw Czechiaść∑ŚÖčŚąóŤĽäÁ≥ĽÁĶĪŚÖ®ÁĒĪŇ†kodaŤá™ŚäõÁĒüÁĒĘ,Czechia . Czechia a u sakasilac nu kazizen uyza amin nuŇ†koda ni sangaan, Czechia kahenulan nu misangaay tu kikay, nu hua-siy a kusi, misangaay a 'kim, mitenunay a kusi, misangaay tu kucu, misangaay a kilang, misangaay a dadungu atu misangaay tu bilu mahiniay a kusi. sakikalisiw Czechia a u sakasilac nu kazizen uyza amin nuŇ†koda ni sangaan, Czechia kahenulan nu misangaay tu kikay, nu hua-siy a kusi, misangaay a 'kim, mitenunay a kusi, misangaay tu kucu, misangaay a kilang, misangaay a dadungu atu misangaay tu bilu mahiniay a kusi. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Czechiaść∑ŚÖčŚąóŤĽäÁ≥ĽÁĶĪŚÖ®ÁĒĪŇ†kodaŤá™ŚäõÁĒüÁĒĘ,Czechia .) Czechia i 2006 a mihcaan mala u kitakitay a gingku pacumut tu a kanatal a silsil. inutimulan i Ou-cou akanatal izaw ku Czechia saizawam min ku talakaway katinengay a tademaw . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Czechiaść∑ŚÖčśĖľ2006 .) u kikay a kusi Pu-la-ke u kahenulanay a u kikay a kusi i tepanay, Pu-rl-no, Au-se-te-la-wa, Pi-el-san atu Mu-la-ta-po-ley-se-la-hu. Czechiau kikay a kusi u kahenulan u nu hua-siy a kusi, kikay, misa'kim atu misanga tu mukanay a u kikay a kusi. uzumaay a kahenulan izaw ku patelay u kikay a kusi, misanga tu luma' atu u u sapalawpes tu tuud sanga' izaw ku zikuz, keliw, kucu, Yin-sua-ye, kilang pasanga' tu uaenengaan nu luma', sasulitan, satekin atu u hitay atu adingu nisanga'ay, i Czechia katenes tu kasumamadan. u kazizeng patahekal u kanatal a u kikay a kusi u kahenulan a kawaw. Czechia a tademaw izaw tu 1,054 mang, duduc tu 2011 a mihcaan tusaay saayaway pahezek tu nikisaan a tzdemaw, tademaw nu Czechia u nu Czechiaay amin a tademaw izaw ku (63.7ÔľÖ), kinapina u Mu-la-wiy-ya a tademaw izaw ku (4.9ÔľÖ), Se-lu-ba-ke a tademaw izaw ku (1.4ÔľÖ), Poland a tdemaw izaw ku (0.4ÔľÖ), Germany a tademaw izaw ku (0.2ÔľÖ) atu Si-li-si-ya a tademaw (0.1ÔľÖ). uyza u kika' nu kanatal"ŚúčÁĪć" taneng mipili tu katuudy a tademaw , kakatuuay ku tademaw nayay ku aenengan (26.0ÔľÖ). duduc tuni sulitan, Czechia pakala tu 25 a mang u Lu-mu a tademaw. (u akamu nu Hulam sa: Czechia ,Czechiaść∑ŚÖčÁöĄŚ§ßŚ§öśēłŚĪÖśįĎśėĮ Czechiaść∑ŚÖčšļļ(63.7ÔľÖ), .) mikawaway tu aidangan namakay i 1989 a mihcaan kunikapingku nu kanatal, Pu-la-ke a tuse ukatuud ku miidangay a tademaw i Europe i mikawaway tu aidangan aca u kalisiway u kahenulanay a kakataynian, 2001 a mihcaan , mikawaway tu aidangan pulung nu micumuday a kalisiw makala tu 1181.3 i' Czechia-ke-lang, calapen ku ko-min-sen-san-maw-e pakala tu 5.5%. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Ťá™Śĺě1989 5.5%.) malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

(u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia*****(***:*…ôsk* r…ôpubr~…ĺika),** ¶z…ô ¶ńßia**(*…ôsko), .) i kasuajawan nu ŇčaŇčajaw a zidaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶z…ô ¶ńßia-s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba- ¶…ô , i kitakit sakas…ôpat tabakiaj a kusi nu kanatar~…ĺ, nika i **** a mińß ¶aan tan-…ô-zuŇč-r~…ĺi-ńßun namar~…ĺar~…ĺijas par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a maŇčaŇč…ôr~…ĺińß mar~…ĺatusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ tu ¶z…ô ¶ńßia atu s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba- ¶…ô zajńßan naujnuanaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a satu, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia misaŇčaaj a kikaj a kusi, bur~…ĺu a kusi, papiidaŇčaj a kusi, ma ¶akat tu amin ujza a ¶a s…ô-r~…ĺa-bu a kanatar~…ĺaj a tad…ômawan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u satar~…ĺakawaj u sakapańßaj sapasubana u masabinawr~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ. tad…ômaw nu gdp u tar~…ĺakawaj, minanam tu ¶udad u sakapańßaj, u min- ¶u-ńßua a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an, naizawaj tu kuniu mar~…ĺumar~…ĺaj a batu Ē~ °aj azidaj ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °Ňčawaan atu bar~…ĺuńßaj a batu Ē~ ° a zitaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ujnian kasumamadan a tad…ômaw atu ajzaaj a ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a bina ¶adan, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku masasi ¶abaj nu bina ¶adan, i r~…ĺar~…ĺajan ¶aaj kajadańß u mid…ôs…ôkaj mi ¶…ôkiwaj a tad…ômaw ńßiza a saan tuni u, katuudaj a tad…ômaw pa ŇčaŇčan sa ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a tad…ômaw aŇčaŇčsawan a tuas u s…ô-r~…ĺa-bu-z…ôn a dat…ômawan, i ¶…ôr~…ĺańß …ôn…ôn nu kasumamadan a mińß ¶aan, i kawanan kawar~…ĺi u kanan…ôr~…ĺan a kakitizaan ,siwa a mińß ¶aan a mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj mapur~…ĺuŇč tu po-si-mi-ja a kanatar~…ĺ ujzaan amin nu ajzaaj a ¶z…ô ¶ńßia . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶z…ô ¶ńßia .) ¶z…ô ¶ńßia-s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba- ¶…ô ****a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk tu saajawaj ŇčaŇčajaw nu kitakit,,ao-suoŇč-di-kuo mawatwat , naujaan u ao-suŇč a sakaput tu ¶z…ô ¶ńßia** mar~…ĺa u misat…ôk…ôdaj tu a kanatar~…ĺ, u namasuŇčaajaj ku ka ¶a ¶ajad tu atu s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba-k…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bataan a bur~…ĺad tusa bataan izaw ku pitu a d…ômiad papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan ¶z…ô ¶ńßia mar~…ĺa u ¶z…ô ¶ńßia-s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba- ¶…ô . masakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: **** ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶z…ô ¶ńßia*********.) ¶…ôn ¶…ô ¶z…ô ¶ńßia . ¶z…ô ¶ńßia u jadańßaj a sakaput u ji-ńßuaj-min- ¶u-z…ô, ¶…ônbu u sakakaaj matin…ôŇčaj tu muk…ôr~…ĺidaj. ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ji-ńßuaj pańßiza tu tusaaj a kawaw, ¶uŇč-i-juan izaw ku *** a tad…ômaw atu ¶an-ji-juan a tad…ômaw izaw tu ** a tad…ômaw a nikapur~…ĺuŇč , nasaajawaj ¶ou-ńßuaj-r~…ĺian-ńß…ô mizuzuńß tu pisiŇčkiw ¶ina ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan, kapańß r~…ĺar~…ĺid asaan tu kina ¶a ¶aj, ¶uŇč*tuŇč ¶aaj ku tat…ôŇčaaj a …ôn…ôŇčan nika u sakakaaj izaw ku tuŇčus a mikuwan, u mańßiniaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkuan par~…ĺatat…ôŇča ku tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ, nika mańßiniaj u mi ¶id…ôkaj a kawaw tan…ôŇč a par~…ĺiwasak tu tad…ôŇčir~…ĺan a kanatar~…ĺ, a situŇčus ¶iniza paŇčaŇčan tu ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi atu mikawawaj tu kanatar~…ĺ a kawaw a tad…ômaw. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu nu ow- ¶ow u ¶z…ô ¶ńßia u i t…ôpan nu ou ur~…ĺabuaj a kanatar~…ĺ, ¶api izaw ku a…ôpataj a kanatar~…ĺ nuamisan u por~…ĺand , t…ôpan nuwar~…ĺian u g…ôrmanj , nutimur~…ĺan u austria atu wamisan nutimur~…ĺan u sr~…ĺo*akia . ajzaaj u ¶z…ô ¶ńßia kańß…ônur~…ĺan izaw tu ajawanaj a au-sun-ti-kou a zidaj po-si-mi-ja atu mu-r~…ĺa-uaj-ja unian tusaaj kasumamadan a kakutizaan, adidi Ē~ °aj a si-r~…ĺi-si-ja a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw niza. kańß…ônur~…ĺanaj u tabakiaj a tus…ô u pragu…ô (pu-r~…ĺa-k…ô ***), maawas ku fu-…ôta-wa a sauwa ¶ tusa a tukus, sar~…ĺuŇčan ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu aazińßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ¶z…ô ¶ńßia ¶a ¶ajaj ku tur~…ĺu makunur~…ĺ ku s…ôpataj a masańß…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj , nutipan u po-si-mi-ja tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, nutimur~…ĺan u ka-…ôr~…ĺ-pa- ¶an a buju Ē~ °, tunusauwa ¶ , ukańß…ônur~…ĺanaj a sauwa ¶ u fu-…ôr~…ĺ-ta-wa sauwa ¶ atu atu mu-r~…ĺa-wa sauwa ¶. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia .) d…ômiad tuŇčusaj u bajuaj pasajza i ta-r~…ĺu a d…ômiad tab…ôsiw tu ku akuti Ē~ °aj a d…ômiad, apar~…ĺar~…ĺudan ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, kasi…ônawan ¶u Ē~ °d…ôt jadańß ku sur~…ĺ…ôda. ujzaan ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôsan tu pituaj a d…ômiad, ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad u ¶u Ē~ °d…ôtaj a d…ômiad. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: . .) sakikar~…ĺisiw ¶z…ô ¶ńßia*********koda****, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia . ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a u sakasir~…ĺa ¶ nu kaziz…ôn ujza amin nu*koda ni saŇčaan, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu misaŇčaaj tu kikaj, nu ńßua-sij a kusi, misaŇčaaj a Ē~ °kim, mit…ônunaj a kusi, misaŇčaaj tu ku ¶u, misaŇčaaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, misaŇčaaj a daduŇču atu misaŇčaaj tu bir~…ĺu mańßiniaj a kusi. sakikar~…ĺisiw ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a u sakasir~…ĺa ¶ nu kaziz…ôn ujza amin nu*koda ni saŇčaan, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu misaŇčaaj tu kikaj, nu ńßua-sij a kusi, misaŇčaaj a Ē~ °kim, mit…ônunaj a kusi, misaŇčaaj tu ku ¶u, misaŇčaaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, misaŇčaaj a daduŇču atu misaŇčaaj tu bir~…ĺu mańßiniaj a kusi. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia*********koda****, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia .) ¶z…ô ¶ńßia i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u kitakitaj a giŇčku pa ¶umut tu a kanatar~…ĺ a sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ. inutimur~…ĺan i ou- ¶ou akanatar~…ĺ izaw ku ¶z…ô ¶ńßia saizawam min ku tar~…ĺakawaj katin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia******* .) u kikaj a kusi pu-r~…ĺa-k…ô u kańß…ônur~…ĺanaj a u kikaj a kusi i t…ôpanaj, pu-rr~…ĺ-no, au-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-wa, pi-…ôr~…ĺ-san atu mu-r~…ĺa-ta-po-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßu. ¶z…ô ¶ńßiau kikaj a kusi u kańß…ônur~…ĺan u nu ńßua-sij a kusi, kikaj, misa Ē~ °kim atu misaŇča tu mukanaj a u kikaj a kusi. uzumaaj a kańß…ônur~…ĺan izaw ku pat…ôr~…ĺaj u kikaj a kusi, misaŇča tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu u u sapar~…ĺawp…ôs tu tuud saŇča Ē~ ° izaw ku zikuz, k…ôr~…ĺiw, ku ¶u, jin-sua-j…ô, kir~…ĺaŇč pasaŇča Ē~ ° tu ua…ôn…ôŇčaan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sasur~…ĺitan, sat…ôkin atu u ńßitaj atu adiŇču nisaŇča Ē~ °aj, i ¶z…ô ¶ńßia kat…ôn…ôs tu kasumamadan. u kaziz…ôŇč patańß…ôkar~…ĺ u kanatar~…ĺ a u kikaj a kusi u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kawaw. ¶z…ô ¶ńßia a tad…ômaw izaw tu *,*** maŇč, dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tusaaj saajawaj pańß…ôz…ôk tu nikisaan a tzd…ômaw, tad…ômaw nu ¶z…ô ¶ńßia u nu ¶z…ô ¶ńßiaaj amin a tad…ômaw izaw ku (**.**), kinapina u mu-r~…ĺa-wij-ja a tad…ômaw izaw ku (*.**), s…ô-r~…ĺu-ba-k…ô a tad…ômaw izaw ku (*.**), por~…ĺand a td…ômaw izaw ku (*.**), g…ôrmanj a tad…ômaw izaw ku (*.**) atu si-r~…ĺi-si-ja a tad…ômaw (*.**). ujza u kika Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ"**" tan…ôŇč mipir~…ĺi tu katuudj a tad…ômaw , kakatuuaj ku tad…ômaw najaj ku a…ôn…ôŇčan (**.**). dudu ¶ tuni sur~…ĺitan, ¶z…ô ¶ńßia pakar~…ĺa tu ** a maŇč u r~…ĺu-mu a tad…ômaw. (u akamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶z…ô ¶ńßia , ¶z…ô ¶ńßia********* ¶z…ô ¶ńßia***(**.**), .) mikawawaj tu aidaŇčan namakaj i **** a mińß ¶aan kunikapiŇčku nu kanatar~…ĺ, pu-r~…ĺa-k…ô a tus…ô ukatuud ku miidaŇčaj a tad…ômaw i …ôurop…ô i mikawawaj tu aidaŇčan a ¶a u kar~…ĺisiwaj u kańß…ônur~…ĺanaj a kakatajnian, **** a mińß ¶aan , mikawawaj tu aidaŇčan pur~…ĺuŇč nu mi ¶umudaj a kar~…ĺisiw makar~…ĺa tu ****.* i Ē~ ° ¶z…ô ¶ńßia-k…ô-r~…ĺaŇč, ¶ar~…ĺap…ôn ku ko-min-s…ôn-san-maw-…ô pakar~…ĺa tu *.*%.
